mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below one percent compresses the equity discount rate and raises the net present value of future corporate cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling three-year conditional mean of twenty-day forward returns for observations in the lowest FEDFUNDS quartile is not positive at the five percent significance level.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding zero point two percentage points signals deteriorating household income and consumption expectations, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next twenty trading days as earnings estimates are revised downward.
failure_condition: In triggered months, positive twenty-day forward returns occur in more than fifty percent of instances over any two-year rolling window, or the mean return in triggered months is not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in industrial production and retail sales indicate a coordinated demand-supply recovery that boosts corporate revenue visibility, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next sixty trading days.
failure_condition: The joint z-score interaction term of INDPRO and RSAFS shows a Rank IC below zero point zero four over any three-year rolling window, or the long-short quintile spread conditioned on both rising is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: In the post-recession recovery regime, a month-over-month increase in housing starts signals a rebound in construction activity and household formation, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next five trading days through cyclical sector earnings leverage.
failure_condition: In periods classified as post-recession recovery, rising HOUST fails to produce positive five-day forward returns in at least fifty-five percent of instances, or the conditional mean return is not statistically greater than zero.

mechanism_narrative: A positive quarter-over-quarter growth print in real GDP signals an exit from recessionary dynamics and an inflection in aggregate corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next sixty trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth quarters are followed by negative sixty-day forward returns in more than forty-five percent of instances over a five-year rolling window, or the conditional mean return is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is held below one percent while payroll employment is declining, the negative labor market signal dominates the monetary easing signal because household income destruction overwhelms valuation support, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next twenty trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 1% and PAYEMS month-over-month change is negative
failure_condition: The interaction portfolio of FEDFUNDS below one percent and falling PAYEMS does not produce negative mean twenty-day forward returns at the five percent significance level over any three-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the industrial production index signals rising capacity utilization and operating leverage for manufacturing firms, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next five trading days as momentum traders reprice near-term earnings.
failure_condition: Months with positive INDPRO changes are followed by negative five-day forward returns in more than forty-five percent of instances over a two-year rolling window, or the conditional mean return is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the consumer price index exceeding zero point two percent signals reflation and pricing power recovery, reducing real debt burdens and supporting nominal revenue growth, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next sixty trading days.
failure_condition: Months with CPIAUCSL increases exceeding zero point two percent do not produce positive sixty-day forward returns in at least fifty-five percent of instances, or the conditional mean return is not significantly positive.
